---
layout: cv
title: Isaac Newtons's CV
---
# Allison Grunig
Business Analytics Student, BYU-Idaho

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="allygrunig@gmail.com">allygrunig@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/allison-grunig">LinkedIn</a>
| (208) 854-9960
</div>


## Currently

Senior at Brigham Young University–Idaho pursuing a degree in Business Analytics with a strong focus on data visualization, analytics, and business intelligence tools.


### Specialized in

Data analytics, dashboards, SQL, Excel, Python, R, Power BI, Tableau, teamwork, problem-solving


### Research interests

Data visualization, business intelligence, analytics-driven decision making, system optimization


## Education

`Expected December 2026`  
__Brigham Young University–Idaho__, Rexburg, ID  

- Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics  
- GPA: 4.0  
- BYU-Idaho Academic Scholarship  
- Advanced understanding of Power BI, Tableau, SQL, Excel, Python, and R  
- Member of Women in Business Society and Supply Chain Management Society  


## Experience

`June 2025 - Present`  
__System Support Administrator__, BYU-Pathways  

- Learned and used data systems to provide licenses to employees worldwide  
- Created dashboards in Wrike to present data from system error requests  
- Collaborated with team members to solve technical issues and support employees  


`February 2025 – June 2025`  
__Closed Captioning Specialist__, BYU-Idaho  

- Utilized databases to provide captioning services for Accessibility Services  
- Maintained strict captioning standards and accuracy  


`September 2024 – January 2025`  
__Package Handler__, FedEx (Boise, ID)  

- Managed shipment tracking and ensured efficient package processing  
- Operated equipment such as hydraulic conveyor belts  
- Maintained safety and efficiency in a fast-paced environment  


`March 2023 – August 2024`  
__Full-Time Volunteer Representative__, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints (Southwest UK)  

- Supported local congregations and community outreach programs  
- Adapted to new cultures and environments while working abroad  
- Led and mentored teams, providing weekly training  
- Collaborated with local leaders and organizations  
- Developed customized materials to meet local needs  


`April 2021 - March 2023`  
__Front Desk Receptionist__, Tomlinson South Meridian YMCA (Meridian, ID)  

- Worked in a team-focused environment providing customer support  
- Handled phone communication and in-person inquiries  
- Processed transactions (cash, credit, check)  
- Communicated policies clearly to members  
- Responded to emergencies and provided assistance  


## Leadership, Skills, & Awards

- BYU-Idaho Academic Scholarship  
- National Honors Society Officer  
- Associate Degree earned in high school  
- Strong skills in Microsoft Office, SQL, Python, R, Tableau, and Power BI  
- Experience with data systems and dashboard creation  
- World traveler with international experience (UK)  
- Cross Country and Volleyball athlete  
- Member of Women in Business Society and Supply Chain Management Society  


## Publications

### Projects

`2025-2026`  
Data analytics dashboards and projects using SQL, Python, R, and visualization tools (Power BI, Tableau)




<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: March 2026 -->
